overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm at night. The truck follows another truck on a snow-covered rural highway flanked by snow-laden forests, with occasional traffic passing by. Game engine footage from a truck simulator with detailed dashboard and weather effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered rural highway through dense forest at night

agents.ego_description: driving truck through heavy snowfall at night, maintaining steady speed while following another truck ahead

notable_agents.action: lead truck with red taillights driving ahead on the snowy road

dense pine trees covered in snow lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm at night. The illuminated dashboard is visible with various gauges and a GPS screen. The truck follows another vehicle down a snow-covered rural highway flanked by dense snowy forests on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding snowy highway through forest with guardrails

events.description: vehicle approaches rapidly from behind and overtakes on the left side, headlights visible in the side mirror and left window

agents.ego_description: navigating gentle curves on the snowy road while maintaining safe distance from the lead truck, adjusting for the overtaking vehicle

notable_agents.action: lead truck continuing down the road, maintaining steady speed through the curves
car overtaking on the left lane, moving quickly past the truck

entered.detail: car with bright headlights overtaking on the left side

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through winding curves in the snowy forest, with guardrails now visible closer on the left side. Around the 38-second mark, a car rapidly approaches from behind and overtakes on the left, its headlights glaring through the snow. The lead truck remains visible ahead, slightly further in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to intersection or junction

events.description: road widens slightly and signage becomes visible indicating approach to a junction or turn-off

agents.ego_description: continuing through the snowy forest as the road approaches a junction, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: lead truck maintaining distance ahead as the road approaches the junction

entered.detail: road sign visible ahead indicating junction or directional information
road widening and approaching intersection or turn-off point

segments.scene_description: After the overtaking vehicle passes and moves out of view, the truck continues down the straightening road. Towards the end of the segment, the road begins to widen and signage becomes visible in the distance, indicating an approaching junction or intersection in the snowy forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a truck cabin as it navigates a heavy nighttime snowstorm through a dense forest toward an approaching road junction. It begins with the glow of an illuminated dashboard and GPS screen as the truck trails another vehicle down a rural highway flanked by snow-laden trees. As the road winds through the forest, the camera tracks closer to the guardrails on the left just as a car rapidly overtakes the truck, its headlights glaring through the falling snow. Once the overtaking vehicle vanishes into the distance, the road begins to straighten and the surrounding forest opens up. The scene finally shifts as the highway widens and distant signage appears, signaling the approach of an intersection.
